nodes.label: 🎉 BentaHub Backend Implementation - Registration & Email Verification
nodes.norm_label: 🎉 bentahub backend implementation - registration & email verification

nodes.label: Graphify Knowledge Graph Rules
nodes.rationale: Specifies how codebase/architecture questions query the graph, skip conditions, and auto-updating practices.

nodes.label: Admin Workflow
nodes.rationale: Ensures secure login, performance report inspection, and user credentials override capability for admin accounts.

nodes.label: Cashier Workflow
nodes.rationale: Restricts cashier actions to a branch-locked endpoint to scan product barcodes, choose Cash/GCash, and dispatch transactions to update branch stock counts.

nodes.label: Staff Workflow
nodes.rationale: Provides staff access to branch-specific stock keeping, floor count updates, low-stock warnings, and preparing deliveries for customer reservations.

nodes.label: Customer Workflow
nodes.rationale: Allows customer registration, real-time localized catalog browsing, reserving items, paying via Cash/GCash, and completing in-store pickup verification.

nodes.label: Strict Payment Methods
nodes.rationale: Limits payment options strictly to Cash and GCash.

nodes.label: No Delivery Architecture
nodes.rationale: Strict walk-in and in-store pickup only; no shipping or delivery logic.

nodes.label: Role-Based Security
nodes.rationale: Enforces cashier and staff to their assigned branches, cross-branch consolidated analytics reserved for admins.

nodes.label: FSD Guidelines
nodes.rationale: Code contributions must adhere to Feature-Sliced Design to maintain module isolation and avoid cross-feature imports.

nodes.label: Isolation Principle
nodes.rationale: Maintains low coupling by strictly isolating features so they cannot import from other features.

nodes.label: Import Rules
nodes.rationale: Restricts dependencies to Shared-to-Feature and Within-Feature imports; forbids Feature-to-Feature imports.

nodes.label: Windows Multiprocessing Fix
nodes.rationale: Windows lacks automatic fork mechanism, causing process pool crashes during script execution unless run single-threaded.
